name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ This mini Dionysus handbag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is crafted with beige and wood brown GG Supreme canvas, cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. The grey-brown suede trim with contrasting texture makes the entire design stand out.
name_cn:
(With full set of packaging)!!️ This mini Dionysus handbag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is crafted with beige and wood brown GG Supreme canvas, cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. The grey-brown suede trim with contrasting texture makes the entire design stand out.
Model: 752029
Size: 18*12*6cm
Color: Red PVC。
